name: NodeDataQualityCheckAndAlert
description: This node is used to perform data quality checks on a DataFrame and send alerts based on the results.

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.title: Email Address
fields.description: Email Address. Add multiple email in comma separated

fields.name: subject
fields.title: Subject
fields.description: The subject of the alert email.

fields.name: threshold
fields.title: Threshold
fields.description: The minimum acceptable overall data quality score (0-100). An alert is sent if the score is less than or equal to this threshold.

fields.name: dataQualityResultPath
fields.title: Result Path
fields.description: The path to save the good and bad records
